landing.badge: Motongi ya portefeuille ya suka pona ba développeurs
landing.subtitle: Nyonso oyo osengeli na yango mpo na kolakisa mayele na yo, misala na yo, mpe mayele na yo.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tozali kopesa bisaleli nyonso oyo osengeli na yango mpo na kokesana na bato mpe kokita na mosala ya ndoto na yo.
landing.feature1Desc: Bongisa biteni na yo, ba projets, mpe mayele na yo na pete na éditeur visuel na biso ya intuitif.
landing.feature2Desc: Pona na kati ya ba modèles oyo esalemi na ndenge ya professionnel to sala look na yo moko unique.
landing.feature3Desc: Landela ba visiteurs na yo, tala ba projets nini ezuaka attention mingi, pe ebele.

minimalist.name: Minimaliste
minimalist.desc: Design propre et simple oyo etali mingi makambo oyo ezali na kati.

developerDark.desc: Thème ya molili parfait pona kolakisa code na ba piles tech.

bentoGrid.name: Grille ya Bento
bentoGrid.desc: Modern Apple-style grid layout oyo ezo souligner ba compétences différentes na efficace.

neoBrutalism.name: Néo-Brutalisme
neoBrutalism.desc: Ba frontières gras na ba couleurs ya contraste ya likolo pona look ya mode, sans pardon.

glassmorphism.name: Morfisme ya verre
glassmorphism.desc: Ba effets ya verre glacé likolo ya ba gradients ya couleur pona UI moderne ya lisse.

linkInBio.name: Lien na Bio
linkInBio.desc: Disposition verticale compacte optimisée pona ba écrans mobiles na ba médias sociaux.

deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Soki endimami, ba données nionso (portefeuille, ba projets, statistiques) ekolongolama libela pe ekoki kozongisama te.

privacy.title: Politiki ya kobatela makambo ya moto ye moko
privacy.intro: Politiki oyo ya kobatela makambo ya moto ye moko elimboli ndenge oyo DevFolio esangisi, esalela, mpe ebatelaka makambo na yo ntango ozali kosalela misala na biso.
privacy.section1Content: Tosangisaka makambo oyo opesi mbala moko ntango ozali kosala kɔnti, kotonga portefeuille, mpe kokutana na lisungi na biso.
privacy.section2Content: Ba informations na yo esalelamaka pona ko fonctionner, kobatela, pe kopesa ba fonctionnalités ya ba services na biso, pe pona kosolola na yo na oyo etali compte to ba services na yo.
privacy.section3Content: Tosalelaka bibongiseli ya kobatela makambo oyo ebongi mpo na kobatela makambo na yo mpo moto azwa yango te, ebimisa yango te, to ebebisa yango te.

confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Elongi te ko effacer compte. Ekoki kozala ete elembo yango esilaki.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Svp bozela, tozo traité demande na bino.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Ba données na yo nionso e supprimer libela. Okozala redirectionné...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Code OTP etindami na email na yo.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Email oyo ekomisami na nzela ya moto ya misato.
forgotPassword.genericError: Libunga moko ezali. Svp meka lisusu.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Code ya OTP elongi ko vérifier.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Code ya OTP esili. Svp bosenga code ya sika.
forgotPassword.otpInvalid: Code OTP oyo ezali malamu te.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Code ya sika ya OTP etindami na email na yo.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Elongi te kotinda lisusu code OTP. Svp meka lisusu.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Mot de passe na elonga ya kozongisa. Svp kota na mot de passe na yo ya sika.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: Elongi te ko réinitialiser mot de passe.
forgotPassword.title: Obosani Mot de passe
forgotPassword.description: Tyá adresse email oyo ekomisami na compte na yo. Toko tinda code OTP pona ko réinitialiser mot de passe.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Tyá code ya 6 chiffres oyo batindi na email na yo mpo na kondimisa bomoto na yo.
forgotPassword.newPasswordTitle: Bosala Mot de passe ya sika
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Salá mot de passe ya sika mpe ya makasi mpo na kobatela compte na yo.
forgotPassword.passwordsDoNotMatch: Ba mots de passe ekokani te.

verifyEmail.resendError: Elongi te kotinda lisusu email ya vérification. Svp meka lisusu.
verifyEmail.title: Tala Email Na Yo
verifyEmail.description: Totindi email ya vérification na adresse email na yo. Svp fungola email mpe finá na butɔ <1>"Kondima compte"</1> mpo na ko activer compte na yo.
verifyEmail.step1: Fungola application na yo ya email (Gmail, Yahoo, etc)
verifyEmail.step2: Boluka email ya DevFolio na sujet "Actable ya compte"
verifyEmail.step3: Finá na butɔ "Confirmer compte" na email
verifyEmail.step4: Oko diriger yo na page ya login pona kokota
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Email ya vérification esili kotindama lisusu!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Ozwaki email yango te? Tala dossier <1>Spam</1> to <2>Junk</2> na email na yo. Lien ya vérification ezali valide pona <3>24 heures</3>.
